expectations.text: Ran 7 manual checks (old skill has no verify.sh)
expectations.evidence: Shows manual commands for each check
ATTEMPT 1 shows FAIL with exact error: mock expects available_stock but code uses current_stock

expectations.text: Agent STOPS at failure instead of continuing
expectations.evidence: 'STOP. Fix required before proceeding.' then FAILURE RECOVERY section

expectations.text: Failure recovery protocol followed (fix, re-run, continue)
expectations.evidence: Shows diff of fix, then ATTEMPT 2 re-runs Check 1 first, continues sequence
All 7 checks shown in ATTEMPT 2 with PASS results

expectations.text: Postcondition trace maps PCs to specific test names
expectations.evidence: 3 PCs derived, each mapped to exact test descriptions

expectations.text: Verification report shows failure recovery log
expectations.evidence: Failure Recovery Log table at bottom with Attempt/Check/Result/Issue/Resolution columns
